rules: Keep responses focused — avoid unnecessary exploration
Prefer targeted edits over full file rewrites
Skip verbose explanations — action over narration
Consider suggesting /compact or spawning a subagent for remaining work

rules.text: NEVER use relative paths in code — use absolute. NEVER use absolute paths when referencing files to user — use relative.
NEVER run independent tool calls sequentially — batch them in parallel.
NEVER mark tasks complete without validation — test everything, require proof.
Always use TypeScript strict mode, never plain JavaScript.
Use Tailwind CSS utility classes, no custom CSS unless necessary.
Keep components under 300 lines, split into modules.
Run build after code changes to verify.
Use context7 MCP for library documentation lookup before writing framework code.
Test on mobile viewport first.
Use project brand colors consistently. Define in tailwind.config.
Generate multilingual content inside Python scripts only, never in terminal commands.
For RTL languages in PPTX: use raw Unicode + rtl=1 XML. For PDF: use appropriate reshaper libraries.
All presentations must be phone-readable: 18pt+ body, 28pt+ headers.
Use correct titles for stakeholders as specified in project CLAUDE.md.
Apply project brand colors on every slide.
pip install always uses --break-system-packages flag if required by system.
NEVER mix RTL and LTR text in the same text run. Always separate into different paragraphs or text boxes.
Use exa-web-search MCP for semantic search.
Use firecrawl MCP for website scraping.
Cross-reference minimum 3 sources before stating facts.
Generate reports in the languages required by stakeholders.
Save research output to designated project research directory with date prefix.
git add specific files only. NEVER git add -A or git add .
git commit with descriptive message following conventional commits format.
git push before deploying.
Run deployment command and wait for completion. Note the deployment URL.
Set production alias after deploy if applicable. NEVER skip this.
Verify deployment with Playwright screenshot after deploy completes.
Activate legal mode from the project's legal system directory.
Reference applicable local and national laws first.
All legal output in formal standard language appropriate to jurisdiction.
Never provide definitive legal advice. Frame as analysis.
Cross-reference with regional regulations when applicable.
